title: prd
description: The current version's buildable requirements — turns the v1 slice into something you can build. Optional layer, scaffolded only with --full. Read project-summary.json first for the thesis.

slice.description: The v1 slice this PRD covers.

context.description: What this version builds and the one risky thing it's testing. Name what is built first but isn't the headline.

v1Goal.description: The one working thing v1 delivers, stated as a flow.

nonGoals.description: What you are deliberately NOT building yet — and where it's deferred.

targetUser.description: Who v1 serves. Every requirement is judged against this one user.

successMetrics.description: The near-term gate v1 must pass — specific and falsifiable. The signals you'll watch.

coreFlow.description: The end-to-end user flow, numbered. One sitting from open to stored.

functionalRequirements.description: What the system must do. Mark the core requirement so effort lands there.

items.description: The concrete requirements under this heading.

core.description: True for the one part worth real effort.

nonFunctional.description: Privacy / performance / reliability / the simplicity guardrail.

openQuestions.description: Unknowns and how you'll resolve each — a spike, a gate, a decision.
